task: Build a unified autoregressive framework that decouples visual encoding to perform both multimodal understanding (e.g., visual question answering) and visual generation (e.g., text-to-image generation) within a single Transformer architecture.

data.name: equation.png
data.description: An image containing a mathematical equation used to evaluate the model's optical character recognition (OCR) and formula-to-LaTeX conversion capabilities.

data.name: doge.jpg
data.description: A specific meme image ("Swole Doge vs. Cheems") used in Figure 5 of the paper. It contains embedded text ("Decoupling Visual Encoding" vs. "Single Visual Encoder") and visual metaphors to evaluate the model's high-level semantic understanding of humor.
